payload.answer: I found a conflict: the existing memory says “Sara is my daughter,” while the new input says “Sara is my niece.” Please choose one of the supported actions: approve_supersession to replace the existing memory with the new one, keep_both to retain both statements, reject_new to keep only the existing memory and discard the new input, or edit to clarify the correct relationship.

details: Conflict requires an explicit safe action before committing.
